sample_reviews.author: James T
sample_reviews.text: KH Plumbing sorted our boiler issue quickly and at a fair price. Very professional and tidy — would definitely recommend to anyone in Leeds.

sample_reviews.author: Sarah M
sample_reviews.text: Called them out for an emergency leak and they arrived within the hour. Brilliant service, really put our minds at ease. Great value too.

sample_reviews.author: David R
sample_reviews.text: Had a new bathroom fitted by KH Plumbing. The work was done to a high standard and they kept the mess to a minimum. Happy with the result.

brand.usp: KH Plumbing Ltd delivers fast, reliable plumbing and heating services across Leeds with transparent pricing and no call-out surprises. From emergency repairs to full bathroom installations, we get the job done right first time.
brand.hero_headline: Leeds Plumbers You Can Rely On
brand.about_paragraph: I'm the director of KH Plumbing Ltd, a Leeds-based plumbing and heating company committed to delivering honest, high-quality work at fair prices. Whether it's a dripping tap, a new boiler, or a complete bathroom refit, my team and I take pride in turning up on time and leaving every job spotless. We cover Leeds and the surrounding areas, and we're always on hand for those unexpected emergencies.
